query:
SELECT ac.id, ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.competenciaId, c.nome AS competenciaNome, ac.peso, ac.notaCorte, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, ac.metaCiclo1, ac.metaCiclo2, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
FROM assessment_competencias ac
LEFT JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id
WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (210001, 210002)
ORDER BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.competenciaId, c.nome AS competenciaNome, ac.peso, ac.notaCorte, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, ac.metaCiclo1, ac.metaCiclo2, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
FROM assessment_competencias ac
LEFT JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id
WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (210001, 210002)
ORDER BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.id;
